title: GitHub Pages publishes the viewer shell
summary: GitHub Pages should publish the static Kage viewer alongside the launch page. The Pages workflow copies mcp/viewer into docs/viewer during deployment, triggers on mcp/viewer changes, and the README/launch page link to ht
body:
GitHub Pages should publish the static Kage viewer alongside the launch page. The Pages workflow copies mcp/viewer into docs/viewer during deployment, triggers on mcp/viewer changes, and the README/launch page link to https://kage-core.github.io/Kage/viewer/. The hosted viewer is a shell for demos/manual JSON; local kage viewer remains preferred for auto-loading repo graph, code graph, metrics, review, and pending queue.
Evidence: Local preview copied mcp/viewer to /tmp/kage-pages-preview/viewer and curl verified /viewer/index.html plus launch page viewer links.
Verified by: curl -fsSI http://127.0.0.1:8128/viewer/index.html; npm test --prefix mcp
